Pantry.title: Pantry List
Pantry.description: User's current list of ingredients in their pantry

userId.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the owner

updatedAt.description: When the pantry was last updated

FavoriteRecipe.title: Favorite Recipe
FavoriteRecipe.description: A recipe favourited by a user

recipeId.description: The Spoonacular ID of the recipe

userId.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the owner

/pantries/{userId}.description: Stores user pantry ingredients indexed by user UID

/favorites/{favoriteId}.description: Stores favorited recipes of all users
